name: Oriental Shrimp Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
2. Peel, devein, and chop the shrimp.
3. Combine shrimp, bean sprouts, water chestnuts, green onions, and celery in a bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, combine mayonnaise and the next three ingredients (lemon juice, soy sauce, and ground ginger); stir well.
5. Add the mayonnaise mixture to the shrimp mixture, tossing gently.
6. Cover and chill.
7. Just before serving, stir in 3/4 cup noodles into the chilled salad.
8. Spoon onto individual lettuce-lined plates and sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup noodles.
